title: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas, TT&A, JSA act on Adani's ₹3,050 crore acquisition of IntelliSmart
description: Adani Energy Solutions Limited has acquired 100% equity share capital in IntelliSmart Infrastructure Private Limited for ₹3,050 crore.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas advised Adani Energy Solutions on this acquisition.The transaction team was led by Subhalakshmi Naskar (Partner, Co-Head - Projects (Infrastructure)) and Ayushi Toshniwal (Partner). Ayushi Toshniwal, Rohil Deshpande (Senior Associate), and Yashasvi Raj (Associate) conducted due diligence.Avaantika Kakkar (Partner, Head - Competition) and
